articles.title: Equity MFs delivered over 8% return last week. Check top 9
articles.description: Equity mutual funds saw a strong performance last week, with over 8% returns for the category. Among the top performers, international funds like Mirae Asset Global X Artificial Intelligence & Technology ETF FoF led the pack with an 8.49% gain.
articles.content: Kotak US Specific Equity Passive FOF, Axis NASDAQ 100 US Specific Equity Passive FOF, and DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF gave 5.72%, 5.62% and 5.45% respectively in the last week.
